top_signals.title: Frustrating Israel, fiber-optic killer drone technology has arrived in southern Lebanon
top_signals.summary: Analysts believe that any military engaged in conflict will, in one form or another, encounter technologies first seen in Ukraine.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Crypto PAC's $5.5 million Congress pick gets Maryland win, more crypto allies advance
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Nord Stream 2 Challenges EU's Russian Gas Phase-Out in Court
top_signals.summary: The owner of the Gazprom-controlled Nord Stream 2 gas pipeline is suing the European Union in the bloc's second-highest court, seeking to annul the EU's binding phase-out of gas imports from Russia, a public document showed.The EU approved a…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: JIP takes sharper nuclear stance than LDP in security proposals
top_signals.summary: The junior coalition partner in the ruling bloc is pushing for a "realistic review" of allowing nukes into the country, while the LDP is looking to bolster extended deterrence.
